grade.en: Thiqah, jurist; one of the Seven Jurists of Madinah

nasab.ar: عروة بن الزبير بن العوام الأسدي القرشي المدني
nasab.en: 'Urwah ibn al-Zubayr ibn al-'Awwam, of Quraysh, Madinah

note.ar: خالته، وأخص من أخذ عنها فقهًا وحديثًا
note.en: his maternal aunt, and his closest source for her fiqh and hadith
his son and his closest transmitter

taqribGrade.ar: ثقة فقيه مشهور، أحد الفقهاء السبعة بالمدينة
taqribGrade.en: Thiqah, celebrated jurist; one of the Seven Fuqaha of Madinah

summary.ar: ابن أخت عائشة عبر أمه أسماء، ومن أعلم الناس بحديثها وسيرة النبي ﷺ، وابنه هشام أخص من روى عنه.
summary.en: Nephew of 'A'ishah through his mother Asma', and among those most learned in her hadith and the Prophet's biography; his son Hisham was his closest transmitter.
